name: TEE Key Storage
description: Ensure cryptographic keys are isolated in TrustZone TEE.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper tee key storage settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on TEE Key Storage. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `tee_storage=active` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "tee_storage=active", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-BHS-02", "cost": "MEDIUM", "estimated_time_hours": 8}
